summary: Completed testing of CA-008 Phase 2 refactoring for ReviewOrder.jsx. Found critical bug in 401 retry flow for online payments. Normal flows working correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: openRazorpayCheckout is not defined in 401 retry flow
critical_bugs.description: CA-008 Phase 2 refactoring extracted openRazorpayCheckout as shared function but it's not accessible in the 401 retry catch block. Error: 'ReferenceError: openRazorpayCheckout is not defined'
critical_bugs.console_error: [Razorpay-Retry] Failed: ReferenceError: openRazorpayCheckout is not defined
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks online payment retry after 401 authentication failure

integration_issues.issue: Razorpay modal fails to open after successful 401 retry
integration_issues.root_cause: Function scoping issue in CA-008 Phase 2 refactoring

passed_tests: TC1: Normal COD order flow - Order placed successfully (Order #000552)
TC2: Normal Online Payment flow - Razorpay modal opens correctly
TC3: COD + 401 retry flow - Works correctly with postpaid payment type
BUG-P2-001 fix verified - COD retry sends correct payment type
Order Success page navigation and display
Bill summary and order items display on success page

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (3/4 test cases passed, 1 critical bug in 401 retry)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix openRazorpayCheckout scoping issue in ReviewOrder.jsx 401 retry flow. The function was extracted in CA-008 Phase 2 but is not accessible in the catch block at line ~1138. Need to ensure the shared function is properly scoped for both main flow and retry flow.
